title: Fever fps
description: FPS Boost Mod- Improves performance and increases FPS by optimizing rendering, reducing lag, and enhancing stability.
body:
![Fever fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74f533a43b6cac4791b65d9cf6f584cf8fbce8e9.jpeg)
# **Fever FPS – Maximize Your Frames, Minimize the Lag**

Fever FPS is a hyper-optimized modpack built for one purpose: insane performance. Designed for low-end PCs and power users alike, it uses the latest performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and more to squeeze out every frame possible. Whether you're playing survival, PvP, or creative, you'll get smoother gameplay, faster load times, and virtually zero stutter. while **USER NEED NVIDIA GRAPHICS CARD FOR USING THIS MODPACK only for 1.20.1 version other version can run without the help of nvidium graphics card**

## **Built to Break FPS Limits**

Say goodbye to lag spikes and low frame rates. Fever FPS is tuned for maximum efficiency, using only the most lightweight and stable performance mods. From rendering to ticking, every part of the game runs faster — and stays stable, even in massive worlds.

## **OptiFine Compatibility Without the Drag**

Love shaders and zoom? Fever FPS brings key OptiFine features like connected textures, zoom, and shaders — without the performance loss. Run high-resolution resource packs with less memory usage and better FPS. but this modpack does not have optifine in it .

## **Lean, Clean, and Fast**


No content mods. No clutter. Fever FPS keeps it simple to ensure the highest FPS possible. This pack works on any server or world, from single-player to large multiplayer networks. Everything is optimized — even the menus.

## **Instant Responsiveness, Everywhere**


From startup to gameplay, everything is faster. Open inventories quicker, move through worlds without lag, and enjoy buttery-smooth animations. Fever FPS is tuned for low input latency, giving you a real edge in combat and parkour.

## **Always Optimized, Always Updated**


Fever FPS stays current with the latest Minecraft versions and performance tech. Updates are frequent, easy to install, and designed to preserve your settings. No more tweaking configs every update — just play.

## **Fabric-Powered for Speed and Flexibility**


Built on the ultra-light Fabric mod loader, Fever FPS is fast by default and fully customizable. Add your own mods on top, or keep it minimal for the best FPS boost possible.

## **Join the Fast Lane**


If you're tired of lag, Fever FPS is your upgrade. Our growing community is all about smooth gameplay, fast support, and sharing tips to get the most out of your hardware. Whether you're on a potato PC or a high-end rig — this is Minecraft, faster than ever.

## **Quick join**


**Download** the Modrinth App.  

Install the Fever FPS Modpack via "Browse" in the app.

Play and enjoy optimized performance.

More info in the [Modpacks on Modrinth](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)

**direct download link** - [download](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fever-fps)

### **ISSUE with this modpack**



 **USER NEED NVIDIA GRAPHICS CARD FOR USING THIS MODPACK only for 1.20.1 version other version can run without the help of nvidium graphics card**
 
 (If anything causes issues, feel free to dm me in Discord - id name is feverspider or text me in [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/fevermodpacks?utm_source=qr&igsh=MW13bTdoaWNwOTdlZA%3D%3D) ) also please support me on insta.
